title: OWill 50 Pcs Black and Gold balloons and Confetti 10 Inch Black Gold Latex Balloons for Party, Birthday, graduation decorations(Black Gold Confetti)
features: 🎈PREMIUM QUALITY LATEX BALLOONS Made from thick, durable latex, these 10 inch black, gold and confetti balloons are built to last. Each balloon inflates evenly and beautifully – perfect for creating stunning party decorations without the worry of popping too soon.

💗GORGEOUS BLACK & GOLD COLOUR COMBO Designed to add elegance and charm to any celebration, this balloon pack includes black, gold and shimmering confetti balloons. Ideal for birthdays, graduation decorations, weddings or black and gold party decorations

🎉DIY FRIENDLY Our balloons are different from ordinary metal balloons on the market. The surface can be free for you to DIY any content: happy birthday, merry christmas, happy halloween, as long as you want anything you can write or doodle on the surface of the balloon

🎀【BLACK GOLD THEME PARTY】: This is a very beautiful party decoration.It will amaze everyone. It is also a great background for shooting.For your birthday, Wedding, anniversary party, graduation ceremony, increase the atmosphere of happiness

😊NOTE: The color effect will be better after the balloon is inflated. Please do not overinflate the balloon. After the balloon is inflated, avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction
